_meta.purpose: Sub-string fragment table. Engine does find-and-replace inline (not full-string lookup). Used for Lua-generated dynamic strings where actor names are interpolated mid-string (e.g. '`Dupre grazed.\n').
_meta.owner: engine-side; loaded as separate section in cht_strings.tab v2
_meta.order: Longer fragments listed first to avoid prefix shadowing during substitution

fragments.en: the noble ruler of the British
It will unlock the gatehouse by the southern entrance to the castle
fragments.zh: 此鑰可開啟城堡南側入口的門房

fragments.en: Then you can come and go as you please
The same key will also let you into the sewers under the castle
fragments.zh: 此鑰亦可通往城堡下方的下水道

fragments.en: Upon your world, five seasons have passed since your
fragments.zh: 汝之世界已歷五載春秋，自汝

fragments.en: You have traded the Avatar's life of peril and adventure
fragments.zh: 汝以聖者之凶險與歷險

fragments.en: for the lonely serenity of a world at peace. But
fragments.zh: 換得此孤寂安寧之世。然

fragments.en: television supermen cannot take the place of friends
fragments.zh: 螢光中之超人，豈能替代

fragments.en: Tongues of lightning lash the sky, conducting an unceasing
fragments.zh: 閃電之舌鞭笞長空，引動不絕之

fragments.en: ...and in moments, the storm is upon you.
In a cataclysm of sound and light, a bolt of searing
fragments.zh: 一聲雷光交響之間，一道熾烈

fragments.en: Is this a sign from distant Britannia?
fragments.zh: 此乃遙遠不列顛尼亞之徵兆？

fragments.en: You have traded the Avatar's life of peril and adventure
fragments.zh: 汝以聖者之凶險與歷險

fragments.en: You bolt from your house, stumbling, running blind in the
fragments.zh: 汝奪門而出，於風暴中跌跌撞撞、盲目奔行於

fragments.en: storm. Into the forest, down the path, through the
fragments.zh: 暴雨之中。穿越森林，沿小徑而下，冒雨

fragments.en: Near the stones, the smell of damp, blasted earth hangs
fragments.zh: 近石陣處，潮濕焦土之氣息瀰漫

fragments.en: in the air. In a frozen moment of lightning-struck
fragments.zh: 於空中。一道閃電凝結之

fragments.en: daylight, you glimpse a tiny obsidian stone in the
fragments.zh: 晝光中，汝瞥見一塊細小黑曜石位於

fragments.en: ...and from the heart of the stones, a softly glowing door
fragments.zh: ……自石陣之心，一道微光柔現之門

fragments.en: Exultant memories wash over you as you clutch the stone.
fragments.zh: 汝緊握此石，狂喜之憶湧上心頭。

fragments.en: When last you saw an orb such as this, it was cast down
fragments.zh: 汝上次見此球之時，乃被

fragments.en: by Lord British to banish the tyrant Blackthorn!
fragments.zh: 不列顛王擲下以放逐暴君布雷克松！
